overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a character exploring an ancient Egyptian temple complex with large decorated stone columns, palm trees, and water features during golden hour. The character walks along colonnades, through grassy gardens, and toward the Nile river with distant boats visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient Egyptian temple colonnade with water feature

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the stone pavement beside the decorated temple columns and water pool

entered.detail: large ancient Egyptian columns with red and white painted patterns
calm water feature running alongside the temple colonnade
stone walkway along the edge of the water
tall palm trees visible in the background beyond the temple

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a stone-paved colonnade beside a calm water pool, with massive decorated Egyptian columns rising on the right. Palm trees are visible in the distance against a clear golden hour sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple garden with tall grass and scattered bushes

events.description: character moves from paved colonnade into grassy garden area with bushes

agents.ego_description: walking through tall grass and bushes moving away from the water into the temple gardens

entered.detail: tall golden grass covering the ground in the temple garden area
dense green bushes with red flowers
rocky desert mountains visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: Moving away from the water, the character enters a grassy garden area with scattered bushes and tall golden grass. The temple columns recede into the mid-ground while palm trees and distant desert mountains become visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy area alongside temple colonnade with palm trees

events.description: sun becomes visible through palm trees creating strong backlit effect

agents.ego_description: walking through grass parallel to the temple columns with sun shining through the palm fronds

entered.detail: green leafy trees providing shade alongside the path

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the temple columns again from the grassy side, walking through palm trees as the sun creates a warm backlit glow. The stone pavement reappears alongside the water as the character circles back toward the colonnade.

scene_state.functional_zone: riverside grassland with view of water and distant boats

events.description: character emerges to riverside with view of ancient boats on the water

agents.ego_description: walking through tall grass toward the river with ancient boats visible in the distance

entered.detail: wide river with calm water reflecting the golden sunlight
ancient Egyptian boat with sail visible on the river
ancient stone ruins and columns visible across the landscape

segments.scene_description: The scene opens to a wide riverside vista with the Nile visible in the distance and an ancient boat sailing on the water. The character walks through tall grass toward distant temple ruins as the sun begins to set, casting long shadows across the landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a temple complex that transitions from structured stone colonnades into an expansive riverside vista. It begins with the character walking along a stone-paved path beside a calm pool, flanked by massive decorated Egyptian columns under a clear golden hour sky. As the camera moves away from the water, the environment shifts into a grassy garden of scattered bushes and tall golden grass, causing the columns to recede while distant desert mountains emerge. The scene then circles back through a grove of backlit palm trees toward the stone pavement and water, before finally opening up to a wide view of the Nile. The movement concludes with the character walking through tall grass toward distant temple ruins as the setting sun casts long shadows across the landscape and a lone boat sails on the river.
